headline: NDX carries an Extreme vol signal with ~50% odds of a >3% weekly move — manage size until FOMC Minutes Wednesday clear the air.
3-day holiday gap with Iran funeral window and semiconductor weakness puts modest downside lean on all four indices — watch crude oil Sunday 6 PM ET for the real directional signal.
Q3 opens with a mild bullish futures lean, but NDX carries Extreme overnight gap risk — a ±1.1% implied swing — with NFP Thursday and July 4 closure amplifying the weekly stakes.
Futures point to a bullish Tuesday open led by tech — but the real test is Thursday's Jobs Report, and SPX $7,408 is the line between cushioned and choppy.
Tech bouncing hard overnight (NQ +1%) but NFP Thursday and a hawkish Fed make this a size-down, confirm-first holiday week — NDX and RUT both rated HIGH for the week.
